$schema_note: Phase 5 M4 section-contrast golden set. Each case posts a draft to /v1/analyze-draft with include_section_contrast=true and asserts that an insight of type 'section_contrast' is returned with the expected contrast_kind.

cases.name: duplicate_verses
cases.content:
[verse]
The sky above is wide and blue
The road below is long and true

[verse]
The sky above is wide and blue
The road below is long and true

[chorus]
We sing tonight
We sing forever
cases.notes: Two identical verses should be flagged.
